rule_text: The Bidder SHALL be RESPONSIBLE for design, engineering (considering already-laid sewerage network in the project area and using materials available at project site), manufacturing, shop fabrication, assembly, testing and inspection at supplier's works, packing, dispatch, shipping, port handling, unloading, storage at site, insurance UP TO take-over by Employer at the END OF O&M PERIOD, handling at site, complete erection, start-up, commissioning, performance testing AND HANDING OVER of the FULL PACKAGE — INCLUDING WARRANTY and DEFECT LIABILITY PERIOD.
source_clause: Volume II Scope of Work — Bidder Responsibilities
verification_method: PASS if scope explicitly enumerates design through DLP/take-over. FAIL on missing scope element (e.g., insurance gap before take-over).

rule_text: Upon ISSUE of COMPLETION CERTIFICATE, the Bidder SHALL be RESPONSIBLE for {{om_years}} (default 2) YEARS of OPERATION AND MAINTENANCE of the complete Facility from the date of issue of the Completion Certificate.
verification_method: PASS if O&M scope = 2 years post-Completion Certificate. FAIL on shorter/longer O&M without justification.

rule_text: Sewer pipelines and structures SHALL be DESIGNED for: MINIMUM VELOCITY at INITIAL PEAK FLOW = 0.6 m/s; MINIMUM VELOCITY at ULTIMATE PEAK FLOW = 0.8 m/s; MAXIMUM VELOCITY = 3.0 m/s. Sewers SHALL be DESIGNED on the assumption that although silting may occur at minimum flow, it would be FLUSHED OUT during peak flows.
source_clause: Volume II — Sewer Hydraulic Design Velocities
verification_method: PASS if hydraulic calculations show v_min ≥ 0.6 m/s and v_max ≤ 3 m/s. FAIL on out-of-range velocities.

rule_text: MINIMUM COVER of {{min_cover_m}} (default 1.0) METRE for sewers SHALL be MAINTAINED below ground level to the TOP of pipe.
source_clause: Volume II — Minimum Cover for Sewers
verification_method: PASS if pipe-laying drawings show ≥1.0 m cover. FAIL on shallower cover without protective slab.

rule_text: BEFORE COMMENCING execution, the contractor SHALL CONDUCT (i) DETAILED SURVEY of the project area; (ii) SOIL INVESTIGATION TESTS / GEOTECHNICAL INVESTIGATIONS; (iii) STUDY of EARTHQUAKE / SEISMOLOGICAL DATA specific to the project location.
verification_method: PASS if site-investigation reports submitted to Engineer before NTP. FAIL on construction commencement without geotech.

rule_text: Sewerage system DESIGN PARAMETERS for Gajuwaka area: RETURN FACTOR for sewage = 80% of net water supply; INFILTRATION provision = 10%; PER-CAPITA SEWAGE GENERATION = 125.4 LPCD. PROJECT POPULATION TARGETS: 2.29 lakh (2021), 2.64 lakh (2036 — design year), 3.02 lakh (2051 — ultimate).
source_clause: Volume II — Sewage Generation Design Basis
verification_method: PASS if BoQ + design report use these exact factors. FAIL on under-sized hydraulic provision.
